title_zh: 新加坡高端酒店餐饮空间家具项目
title_en: Singapore Luxury Hotel Dining Space Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于新加坡一处高端酒店餐饮空间，整体定位为精品酒店餐厅与商务宴请接待空间。空间以深色木饰面、镜面天花、暖色灯光、艺术吊灯、定制餐桌及高质感软装为主要设计语言，强调安静、私密、精致的用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合酒店餐饮空间的高端定位；座椅和卡座需要兼顾舒适度与耐用性；不同区域需要不同家具解决方案；家具落地效果要保持统一。

【我们的解决方案】根据酒店空间风格进行家具深化匹配，以沉稳、高级、耐用为核心。圆桌宴请区以单椅为主；靠墙卡座区采用双向对坐结构；半开放包厢区通过木质隔断、固定卡座、壁灯和餐桌形成完整用餐单元。

【落地效果】圆桌宴会区整体更加稳重正式；卡座区域通过浅色坐垫和深木结构的搭配让空间更有层次；整体实现了酒店设计感、商业耐用性、舒适体验、空间统一性之间的平衡。
desc_en: Singapore boutique hotel restaurant and business dining space. Dark wood paneling, warm lighting and artistic chandeliers create a quiet, refined dining experience. Solution: banquet chairs, booth seating, private room furniture and lounge seating.

title_zh: 纽约高端酒店软包家具项目
title_en: New York Luxury Hotel Upholstered Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于美国纽约，是一个定位高端的城市酒店项目。酒店整体空间融合了现代奢华、东方艺术感与纽约都市气质，公共区域包含大堂休闲区、酒廊、会客区、泳池休闲区及部分套房空间。

【客户需求】家具风格必须与酒店整体设计统一；产品需要适合酒店高频使用；坐感要舒适但造型不能松垮；细节工艺要经得起近距离观察。

【我们的解决方案】酒廊和会客区域以低重心沙发、休闲椅和组合座椅为主；大堂休闲区强调开放式会客体验；泳池及休闲空间注重轻盈感和舒适度；套房和私密休息区域强调安静、舒适和居住感。

【落地效果】酒廊区域沙发和休闲椅与深色吧台、暖色灯带、壁炉和木饰面形成统一氛围；公共休闲区米灰色、暖棕色软包家具让空间更有层次。
desc_en: New York high-end hotel upholstered furniture project. Modern luxury blended with Eastern artistry. Covers lobby lounge, bar, meeting areas, poolside and suite spaces with premium upholstered seating.

title_zh: 高端咖啡厅家具工程案例
title_en: Custom Furniture for a Contemporary Cafe Space
desc_zh:
本项目为一处现代商业咖啡厅空间，整体定位偏向高端、安静、松弛的城市咖啡体验。空间以大面积落地玻璃、自然采光、浅木色墙面、金属网格吊顶为主要设计语言。

【客户核心需求】家具需要符合咖啡厅整体设计调性，具备设计感，同时保持简洁克制；要适合高频商业使用；不同区域需要不同的家具组合。

【我们的解决方案】临窗区域配置木质靠背餐椅、黑色软包坐垫及圆形小餐桌；吧台区域采用黑色皮面与暖棕木色结合的休闲椅；休闲停留区搭配软包卡座、条纹布艺单椅。

【家具配置亮点】靠窗区小圆桌与轻便餐椅适合高频翻台；卡座区软包长椅提升舒适度；休闲区条纹布艺单椅形成视觉记忆点；整体颜色控制在黑色、暖棕色、浅木色之间。
desc_en: High-end modern cafe furniture project. Floor-to-ceiling glass, warm wood tones define the space. Solution: slim metal-leg dining chairs for window zone, leather leisure chairs for bar zone, booth seating and stripe accent chairs for lounge zone.

title_zh: 德基广场空中花园户外咖啡厅家具项目
title_en: Deji Plaza Sky Garden Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
德基广场作为南京高端商业地标，本项目位于一期七层空中花园休闲区域，以城市绿洲为核心概念，将餐饮、咖啡、休憩、社交体验融合在同一空间中。

【客户需求】家具必须与空中花园的自然氛围融合；需要具备较强的商业耐用性；造型要有设计感；需要适应咖啡外摆区、吧台高脚椅区、公共休闲区等不同功能区域。

【我们的解决方案】材质以暖木色、咖色、米色为主；产品类型涵盖高脚吧椅、咖啡桌椅、休闲椅、公共长椅及定制化座位组合。

【落地效果】暖木色座椅、简洁的咖啡桌、弧形吧台和高脚椅与周围绿植、灯光、建筑曲线形成了统一的视觉关系，让空间同时具备了翻台效率、停留舒适度和品牌调性。
desc_en: Sky garden outdoor cafe furniture at Deji Plaza, Nanjing. Urban oasis concept. Warm wood, cafe brown and beige tones with high bar stools, cafe tables, lounge chairs and public benches integrated with greenery.

title_zh: 伦敦意式餐厅家具项目
title_en: London Italian Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于英国伦敦东区的一家意式餐厅，面积约160平方米，定位为温馨、随性而有格调的社区意餐小馆。空间以暖琥珀色墙面、密集装裱的艺术画、深棕皮革卡座与黄铜壁灯为主，营造亲切、复古、文艺的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】座椅要兼顾长时停留舒适与高频翻台耐用；靠墙卡座需在有限面积内提升坐位密度；风格要呼应墙面艺术与暖色调；皮革面料须耐磨易护理，符合英国BS7176商用阻燃标准。

【我们的解决方案】靠墙区采用深棕皮革软包卡座搭配白色圆桌/方桌，围合舒适、坐位密度高；中厅与吧台区配置弯木餐椅与金属线条椅，轻便耐用；吧台用大理石台面搭配高脚椅；所有皮革做防污处理并通过BS7176阻燃测试。

【落地效果】深棕卡座与暖墙、画作、黄铜壁灯形成统一的文艺复古氛围；弯木椅轻便耐用、便于翻台；阻燃防污皮革兼顾质感与维护成本；整体在小空间内实现了氛围、舒适与商业耐用的平衡。
desc_en:
A neighbourhood Italian restaurant in East London, approx. 160 sqm, positioned as a warm, casual yet characterful trattoria. Amber walls densely hung with framed art, deep-brown leather banquettes and brass sconces create an intimate, retro and artful dining atmosphere.

Client needs: seating must balance long-stay comfort with high-turnover durability; wall banquettes must raise seat density in a compact space; the style must echo the art wall and warm tones; leather must be wear-resistant, easy to maintain and meet UK BS7176 commercial fire standards.

Solution: deep-brown leather banquettes with white round and square tables along the walls for comfort and density; bentwood and wire-frame chairs in the main hall and bar, lightweight and durable; a marble-top bar with stools; all leather stain-treated and BS7176 fire-tested.

Result: brown banquettes with warm walls, artwork and brass sconces form a unified retro-artful atmosphere; bentwood chairs are light and turnover-friendly; fire-rated stain-resistant leather balances texture and upkeep; the compact space balances ambience, comfort and commercial durability.

title_zh: 北京川菜馆家具定制项目
title_en: Beijing Sichuan Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于北京市核心商圈的一家川菜主题餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为正宗川菜体验与商务宴请场所。空间设计以深木色、红色点缀与现代中式元素为主，营造热情、传统而不失现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合川菜餐厅的文化调性；座椅需兼顾舒适度与高频翻台效率；包厢区需要私密性强的卡座设计；整体耐用性要经受高人流量考验；材质需防油污易清洁。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色与红色软包坐垫交替排列，与空间主题呼应；靠墙卡座区采用高背软包卡座，红木色框架搭配深色皮革，围合感强且易清洁；包厢区定制固定卡座与活动餐椅组合，软包面料选用防污耐磨商用级材质；散台区配置可快速翻台的轻便餐椅与圆桌组合。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰元素形成统一视觉语言；卡座区的红木色框架与墙面装饰线条相呼应；包厢区软包座椅提升了私密用餐体验；所有座椅通过防污面料处理，大幅降低了日常维护成本；整体家具配置在保持文化氛围的同时，满足了高频商业使用的耐久性要求。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Beijing's core business district. 280 sqm space blending traditional Sichuan culture with modern design. Deep wood tones, red accents and contemporary Chinese elements.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with red upholstered cushions for main hall; high-back leather booth seating with rosewood frames for wall zones; custom booth-chair combinations for private rooms with stain-resistant commercial-grade fabric; lightweight chairs with round tables for quick-service zones.

Result: wood chairs echoed Sichuan cultural decor; rosewood booth frames matched wall trim; private room upholstery enhanced dining privacy; stain-resistant fabric significantly reduced maintenance costs while preserving cultural atmosphere and meeting high-frequency durability requirements.

title_zh: 广州CHIO起雾·客厅家具项目
title_en: Guangzhou CHIO Cafe & Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于广州某高端商业综合体内的CHIO起雾·客厅复合空间，面积约350平方米，定位为咖啡、轻食、社交、办公多功能融合空间。整体设计以浅木色、米白色与暖灰色为主调，强调自然、放松、高效的现代都市生活方式。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应多场景使用（办公、社交、休闲）；座椅要兼顾长时间停留的舒适度；不同功能区需要不同的家具组合；整体风格需与品牌"起雾"的轻松、模糊边界感契合；产品须符合高端商业空间的品质要求。

【我们的解决方案】吧台区配置高脚椅，浅木色与金属腿结合，简洁轻盈；咖啡散座区选用北欧风餐椅搭配小圆桌，适合快速翻台；沙发休闲区配置深度坐感的布艺沙发与单人休闲椅，米白色与暖灰色交织；办公共享区定制长桌搭配人体工学座椅，满足长时间工作需求；部分区域使用模块化座椅，可根据活动需求灵活组合。

【落地效果】浅木色家具与大面积落地玻璃、自然采光形成通透轻盈的空间感；米白色沙发与暖灰色单椅让休闲区更具层次；办公区人体工学椅显著提升了顾客停留时长；模块化座椅的灵活性让空间承办小型活动时游刃有余；整体家具配置成功诠释了"起雾"品牌模糊工作与休闲边界的理念，深受年轻客群喜爱。
desc_en:
CHIO Cafe & Lounge multi-functional space in a premium Guangzhou commercial complex. 350 sqm space integrating coffee, light meals, socializing and co-working. Light wood, off-white and warm grey palette emphasizing natural, relaxed modern urban lifestyle.

Solution: light wood and metal bar stools for counter zone; Nordic-style dining chairs with small round tables for quick-service cafe zone; deep-cushion fabric sofas and lounge chairs in off-white and warm grey for relaxation zone; long tables with ergonomic chairs for co-working zone; modular seating for flexible event configurations.

Result: light wood furniture paired with floor-to-ceiling glass created airy transparency; off-white sofas and grey lounge chairs added visual depth to relaxation zones; ergonomic office chairs significantly increased dwell time; modular seating flexibility enabled small events; overall furniture successfully embodied the brand's concept of blurring work-leisure boundaries, earning strong appeal among young clientele.

title_zh: 杭州川菜馆家具定制项目
title_en: Hangzhou Sichuan Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于杭州市某商业街区的川菜主题餐厅，面积约180平方米，定位为面向本地食客与游客的正宗川菜体验空间。空间设计以深红色、原木色与金属元素为主，营造热烈、传统且具有现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需符合川菜餐厅的文化特色；座椅要舒适且耐用，适应高频翻台；预算控制在合理范围内；材质需防油污、易清洁；整体风格需与杭州本地审美结合。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色软包坐垫，耐用易清洁；靠窗卡座区采用红色皮革软包搭配木质框架，增加视觉记忆点；散台区选用轻便餐椅，方便快速调整座位布局；所有座椅面料经过防污处理，符合川菜高油餐饮场景需求。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰相得益彰；红色卡座成为顾客拍照打卡的热门区域；防污面料显著降低了日常清洁难度；整体家具配置在预算范围内实现了文化表达与商业实用性的平衡。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Hangzhou commercial district. 180 sqm space targeting local diners and tourists seeking authentic Sichuan cuisine. Deep red, natural wood and metal elements create warm, traditional yet modern dining atmosphere.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with dark brown upholstered cushions, durable and easy to clean; red leather upholstered booth seating with wood frames at window zone for visual appeal; lightweight chairs for flexible seating arrangements; all fabrics treated with stain-resistant coating for high-oil Sichuan cuisine environment.

Result: wood chairs complemented Sichuan cultural decor; red booths became popular photo spots; stain-resistant fabric significantly eased daily cleaning; overall furniture configuration achieved balance between cultural expression and commercial practicality within budget.

title_zh: 陕西汉中市火锅店家具项目
title_en: Hanzhong Shaanxi Hot Pot Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于陕西省汉中市某商业综合体内的火锅主题餐厅，面积约220平方米，定位为面向家庭聚餐与朋友聚会的大众火锅消费场所。空间设计以暖木色、橙红色与工业感元素为主，营造热闹、亲民、舒适的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应火锅餐饮的高温高湿环境；座椅要防水防污，易于清洁维护；卡座区需满足4-6人家庭聚餐需求；整体造价需控制在连锁火锅店预算范围内；耐用性要经受每日高频使用考验。

【我们的解决方案】主厅散台区配置仿木纹防火板餐桌搭配仿皮餐椅，防水易擦；卡座区采用皮革软包长椅搭配固定桌面，围合感强且便于清洁；所有座椅使用商用级防污皮革，耐高温、防油污；桌面选用耐高温台面材质，抗烫伤、易清洁；椅脚采用加固金属框架，增强承重与稳定性。

【落地效果】仿皮座椅与火锅场景完美适配，油污水渍一擦即净；卡座区成为家庭聚餐的首选区域；耐高温桌面经受住了每日火锅使用的考验；金属框架椅腿显著提升了产品使用寿命；整体家具配置在控制成本的同时，满足了火锅餐饮的特殊使用需求，获得业主持续复购。
desc_en:
Hot pot restaurant furniture project in a Hanzhong, Shaanxi commercial complex. 220 sqm space targeting family dining and social gatherings. Warm wood tones, orange-red accents and industrial elements create lively, approachable and comfortable dining atmosphere.

Solution: wood-effect laminate tables with faux-leather chairs for open seating, waterproof and easy to wipe; leather upholstered booth benches with fixed tabletops for strong enclosure and easy cleaning; all seating uses commercial-grade stain-resistant leather, heat-resistant and oil-proof; tabletops in heat-resistant material, scald-proof and easy to clean; reinforced metal chair frames for enhanced load-bearing and stability.

Result: faux-leather chairs perfectly suited hot pot environment, oil and water stains wiped clean instantly; booth zones became preferred choice for family dining; heat-resistant tabletops withstood daily hot pot use; metal chair frames significantly extended product lifespan; overall furniture configuration met specialized hot pot dining requirements while controlling costs, earning repeat orders from the owner.

title_zh: 东京精品咖啡馆家具项目
title_en: Tokyo Specialty Coffee Shop Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于日本东京六本木的一家精品咖啡馆，面积约140平方米，定位为安静、克制、主打手冲的极简日式咖啡空间。空间以浅松木、白色与大面积落地玻璃为主，引入日式庭院景观，营造明亮、温润、专注的咖啡体验。

【客户核心需求】家具要契合极简日式调性、用材克制自然；吧台区需便于顾客观看手冲制作；长桌与吧凳要兼顾独坐办公与多人拼坐；木质须环保耐用、易清洁。

【我们的解决方案】吧台区配置浅松木高脚凳，便于近距离观看冲煮；中部设浅木长桌搭配白色座椅，满足拼坐与独坐；临窗与庭院侧布置轻量座椅；木作选用浅色实木、做食品级环保涂装，桌面防水耐磨。

【落地效果】浅松木与白色、玻璃庭院形成通透明亮的极简日式氛围；吧台高凳强化了手冲互动；长桌灵活满足办公与社交；环保木作契合可持续理念。
desc_en:
A specialty coffee shop in Roppongi, Tokyo, approx. 140 sqm, positioned as a quiet, restrained, pour-over-focused minimalist Japanese coffee space. Pale pinewood, white and floor-to-ceiling glass with a Japanese garden view create a bright, warm and focused coffee experience.

Client needs: furniture must match a minimalist Japanese tone with restrained natural materials; the bar must let guests watch pour-over brewing; long tables and stools must serve both solo working and group seating; wood must be eco-friendly, durable and easy to clean.

Solution: pale pinewood bar stools for close-up brewing views; pale wood communal tables with white chairs for shared and solo use; lightweight seating by the windows and garden; light solid wood with food-grade eco finishes and water-resistant tabletops.

Result: pale pinewood, white tones and the glass garden form an airy, minimalist Japanese atmosphere; bar stools enhance the pour-over interaction; long tables flexibly serve work and social use; eco-friendly woodwork aligns with sustainability values.

title_zh: 悉尼海鲜餐厅家具项目
title_en: Sydney Seafood Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于澳大利亚悉尼的一家海鲜餐厅，面积约300平方米（含室内与露台），定位为明亮、轻松、绿意盎然的海岸风海鲜餐饮空间。空间以大量绿植、藤编、蓝绿色卡座与白色纸灯笼为主，自然采光充足，营造通透、度假感的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】座椅要轻松舒适、风格清新；卡座需呼应海岸蓝绿主题；露台家具须防晒防水耐候；面料须通过澳洲AFRDI商用耐用标准；室内外风格要统一过渡。

【我们的解决方案】主厅采用编织靠背木餐椅搭配原木桌，清新耐用；靠墙区配置蓝色与绿色布艺软包卡座，呼应海岸主题；吧台区设高脚椅；露台选用防腐木与防水坐垫的户外椅、配遮阳伞；面料通过AFRDI测试，户外件做防晒防水处理。

【落地效果】编织椅、蓝绿卡座与绿植、白灯笼形成清新通透的海岸氛围；室内外家具风格统一过渡；露台家具经受日晒雨淋仍保持良好；整体兼顾轻松体验与商业耐用。
desc_en:
A seafood restaurant in Sydney, Australia, approx. 300 sqm (indoor and terrace), positioned as a bright, relaxed, greenery-filled coastal seafood dining space. Abundant plants, rattan, blue-and-green banquettes and white paper lanterns with ample daylight create an airy, holiday-like atmosphere.

Client needs: seating must be relaxed, comfortable and fresh in style; banquettes must echo the coastal blue-green theme; terrace furniture must be sun-, water- and weather-resistant; fabrics must pass Australian AFRDI commercial durability standards; indoor and terrace styles must transition seamlessly.

Solution: woven-back wood dining chairs with solid-wood tables in the main hall, fresh and durable; blue and green fabric banquettes along the walls echoing the coastal theme; bar stools at the counter; rot-resistant wood outdoor chairs with waterproof cushions and parasols on the terrace; fabrics AFRDI-tested, outdoor pieces sun- and water-treated.

Result: woven chairs, blue-green banquettes, plants and white lanterns form a fresh, airy coastal atmosphere; indoor and terrace furniture transition seamlessly; terrace pieces hold up under sun and rain; the whole balances a relaxed experience with commercial durability.

title_zh: 伦敦港式茶餐厅家具项目
title_en: London Hong Kong-Style Canteen Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于英国伦敦的一家港式茶餐厅，面积约200平方米，定位为热闹、复古、烟火气十足的香港大牌档风格餐饮空间。空间以红色灯笼、霓虹招牌、绿色水磨石桌面、镀铬金属椅与外露工业管线为主，营造怀旧而活力的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要适应高翻台、高人流的茶餐厅节奏；座椅与桌面要结实耐用、好清洁；造型要呼应港式复古风；红色吧凳与金属椅须耐磨防锈。

【我们的解决方案】散座区采用镀铬金属餐椅搭配绿色水磨石/防火板桌面，结实易清洁、翻台快；吧台区配红色软包高脚凳；靠墙设卡座长椅提升坐位密度；金属件做防锈处理，桌面耐磨防水。

【落地效果】镀铬金属椅、绿台面与红灯笼、霓虹形成强烈的港式复古记忆点；耐用易清洁的桌椅适配高频运营；红色吧凳成为打卡点；整体兼顾氛围、翻台效率与耐用。
desc_en:
A Hong Kong-style canteen in London, approx. 200 sqm, positioned as a lively, retro, bustling Hong Kong dai pai dong-style eatery. Red lanterns, neon signs, green terrazzo tabletops, chrome metal chairs and exposed industrial ducting create a nostalgic yet energetic atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must suit the high-turnover, high-traffic pace of a canteen; chairs and tabletops must be sturdy, durable and easy to clean; the look must echo retro Hong Kong style; red stools and metal chairs must be wear- and rust-resistant.

Solution: chrome metal chairs with green terrazzo and laminate tabletops for open seating, sturdy, easy to clean and quick to turn over; red upholstered bar stools at the counter; bench booths along the walls to raise seat density; metal parts rust-treated, tabletops wear- and water-resistant.

Result: chrome chairs and green tops with red lanterns and neon form a strong retro Hong Kong signature; durable, easy-clean furniture suits high-frequency operation; the red stools become a photo spot; the whole balances atmosphere, turnover and durability.

title_zh: 伦敦粤菜餐厅家具项目
title_en: London Cantonese Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于英国伦敦的一家粤菜餐厅，面积约220平方米，定位为暖调、私密、富有电影感的现代粤式餐饮空间。空间以暖琥珀与酒红色调、弧形红色皮革卡座、木饰肋墙与台灯为主，营造静谧、考究的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】卡座要私密舒适、围合感强；皮革面料须耐磨易护理、通过欧盟阻燃标准；吧台区需便于单人用餐与社交；整体要呼应暖调电影感氛围。

【我们的解决方案】主厅采用弧形红色皮革高背卡座搭配深木圆桌，围合私密；每桌配小台灯强化氛围；吧台区设木质/皮面高脚椅，便于单人就餐；所有皮革做防污处理并通过欧盟阻燃测试。

【落地效果】弧形红皮卡座与木肋墙、台灯形成暖调电影感的统一氛围；高背卡座为顾客提供私密用餐体验；阻燃防污皮革兼顾质感与维护；吧台高脚椅丰富了用餐与社交场景。
desc_en:
A Cantonese restaurant in London, approx. 220 sqm, positioned as a warm, intimate, cinematic modern Cantonese dining space. Warm amber and wine-red tones, curved red leather booths, ribbed wood walls and table lamps create a hushed, refined atmosphere.

Client needs: booths must be private, comfortable and well-enclosed; leather must be wear-resistant, easy to maintain and meet EU fire standards; the bar must suit solo dining and socialising; the whole must echo a warm, cinematic mood.

Solution: curved red leather high-back booths with dark-wood round tables in the main hall for privacy; a small table lamp per table to reinforce mood; wood and leather bar stools for solo dining; all leather stain-treated and EU fire-tested.

Result: curved red booths with ribbed walls and lamps form a unified warm, cinematic atmosphere; high-back booths give guests a private dining experience; fire-rated stain-resistant leather balances texture and upkeep; bar stools enrich dining and social scenes.

title_zh: 香港点心餐厅家具项目
title_en: Hong Kong Dim Sum Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于中国香港的一家点心餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为复古摩登、融合东西方元素的现代点心餐饮空间。空间以粉色拱券、水磨石、绿色瓷砖与拱形天花为主，搭配蓝、粉色软包卡座，营造活泼而考究的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】点心餐厅翻台高、需较高坐位密度；卡座要舒适并呼应粉拱与撞色主题；长桌要满足多人拼坐；面料须耐磨易清洁、符合商用阻燃标准。

【我们的解决方案】沿拱券布置蓝色与粉色撞色软包卡座搭配圆桌，围合且呼应空间配色；中部设深木长桌满足多人拼坐；散座配轻便餐椅便于翻台；软包面料做防污处理并通过阻燃测试。

【落地效果】撞色卡座与粉拱、水磨石、绿砖形成强烈的复古摩登记忆点；长桌契合点心多人共食场景；高坐位密度与易清洁面料适配高翻台运营；整体兼顾设计感与商业实用。
desc_en:
A dim sum restaurant in Hong Kong, approx. 280 sqm, positioned as a retro-modern dim sum dining space blending Eastern and Western elements. Pink terracotta arches, terrazzo, green tiles and arched ceilings paired with blue and pink upholstered booths create a playful yet refined atmosphere.

Client needs: dim sum service has high turnover and needs high seat density; booths must be comfortable and echo the pink arches and colour-block theme; long tables must serve communal dining; fabrics must be wear-resistant, easy to clean and meet commercial fire standards.

Solution: blue and pink colour-block upholstered booths with round tables along the arches, enclosed and echoing the palette; dark-wood communal tables for group dining; lightweight chairs for open seating and fast turnover; fabrics stain-treated and fire-tested.

Result: colour-block booths with pink arches, terrazzo and green tiles form a strong retro-modern signature; communal tables suit shared dim sum dining; high seat density and easy-clean fabrics suit high turnover; the whole balances design and commercial practicality.

title_zh: 蒙特利尔现代餐厅家具项目
title_en: Montreal Modern Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于加拿大蒙特利尔一家高端酒店内的现代餐厅与酒吧，面积约420平方米，定位为现代、轻奢、艺术感的酒店餐饮与社交空间。空间以水磨石、渐变青绿墙面、黄铜与大理石为主，搭配白色弧形卡座与人字拼木地板，营造明亮通透而精致的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要符合高端酒店餐饮的品质与现代调性；弧形卡座与单椅要兼顾造型与久坐舒适；吧台高脚椅须皮质耐磨；不同区域（餐饮、酒吧、休闲）需差异化方案；用材须耐用易护理。

【我们的解决方案】餐饮区采用白色弧形软包卡座搭配圆背餐椅，造型现代、坐感舒适；酒吧区配皮面黄铜脚高脚椅与大理石吧台；休闲区布置软包圆凳；填充用高密度海绵，面料与皮革耐磨易护理。

【落地效果】白色弧形卡座、圆背椅与水磨石、黄铜、渐变墙面形成现代轻奢的统一调性；皮面高脚椅经受高频使用；不同区域家具各司其职又风格统一；整体提升了酒店餐饮的品质感。
desc_en:
A modern restaurant and bar inside a high-end hotel in Montreal, Canada, approx. 420 sqm, positioned as a modern, light-luxury, artful hotel dining and social space. Terrazzo, gradient teal-green walls, brass and marble paired with white curved banquettes and herringbone wood floors create a bright, airy yet refined atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the quality and modern tone of high-end hotel dining; curved banquettes and chairs must balance form with long-stay comfort; bar stools must use wear-resistant leather; different zones (dining, bar, lounge) need distinct solutions; materials must be durable and easy to maintain.

Solution: white curved upholstered banquettes with round-back dining chairs in the dining zone, modern and comfortable; leather brass-leg bar stools with a marble counter in the bar; upholstered round ottomans in the lounge; high-density foam fill with wear-resistant, easy-care fabrics and leather.

Result: white curved banquettes and round-back chairs with terrazzo, brass and gradient walls form a unified modern light-luxury tone; leather bar stools withstand frequent use; each zone has its role while staying unified; the whole elevates the hotel dining experience.

title_zh: 伦敦意式小馆家具项目
title_en: London Italian Trattoria Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于英国伦敦的一家意式小馆（trattoria），面积约170平方米，定位为温馨、精致、邻里感的意式正餐空间。空间以赤陶色墙裙、奶白上墙、深木餐椅与白色桌布为主，配暖色壁灯与钢框玻璃隔断，营造亲切而考究的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】座椅要正餐久坐舒适又便于高频翻台；靠墙卡座提升坐位密度；风格要呼应暖调赤陶与艺术墙；面料与木作耐用易护理，符合英国BS7176阻燃标准。

【我们的解决方案】主厅采用深木框架餐椅搭配白桌布圆桌；靠墙设皮革/布艺卡座长椅；吧台区配高脚椅与吧台；钢框玻璃隔断分区；座椅填充高密度海绵，面料通过BS7176阻燃测试、做防污处理。

【落地效果】深木餐椅、白桌布与赤陶墙、壁灯、艺术画形成温馨考究的意式氛围；卡座提升坐位密度；钢框玻璃隔断让分区通透；耐用阻燃家具适配高频正餐运营。
desc_en:
An Italian trattoria in London, approx. 170 sqm, positioned as a warm, refined, neighbourhood Italian dining space. Terracotta wainscoting, cream upper walls, dark-wood chairs and white tablecloths with warm wall sconces and steel-framed glass partitions create an intimate yet refined atmosphere.

Client needs: seating must be comfortable for full-service dining yet turnover-friendly; wall banquettes must raise seat density; the style must echo the warm terracotta and art wall; fabric and woodwork must be durable, easy to maintain and meet UK BS7176 fire standards.

Solution: dark-wood frame chairs with white-tablecloth round tables in the main hall; leather and fabric bench booths along the walls; bar stools and a counter in the bar; steel-framed glass partitions for zoning; high-density foam fill with BS7176 fire-tested, stain-treated fabrics.

Result: dark-wood chairs and white tablecloths with terracotta walls, sconces and artwork form a warm, refined Italian atmosphere; booths raise seat density; steel-framed glass partitions keep zoning transparent; durable fire-rated furniture suits high-frequency full-service operation.

title_zh: 巴黎复古汉堡餐厅家具项目
title_en: Paris Retro Burger Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于法国巴黎的一家复古汉堡餐厅，面积约180平方米，定位为复古、暖调、有电影氛围感的美式diner风格快餐空间。空间以落日渐变色灯光、霓虹招牌、奶黄色卡座与白色餐桌为主，营造怀旧而活力的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】汉堡快餐翻台高，座椅与桌面要结实耐用、好清洁、防油污；diner卡座要呼应复古暖调；坐位密度要高；面料须耐磨防污。

【我们的解决方案】沿墙布置奶黄色软包diner卡座搭配白色餐桌，围合且坐位密度高；散座配轻便餐椅；吧台区设高脚椅；软包用防污耐磨面料、桌面防油易擦；金属脚做防锈处理。

【落地效果】奶黄卡座与落日灯光、霓虹招牌形成统一的复古diner氛围；防污桌椅适配汉堡快餐高频、重油场景；高坐位密度提升翻台；整体兼顾复古氛围与商业耐用。
desc_en:
A retro burger restaurant in Paris, France, approx. 180 sqm, positioned as a retro, warm, cinematic American diner-style fast-casual space. Sunset-gradient lighting, neon signage, cream-yellow booths and white tables create a nostalgic yet energetic atmosphere.

Client needs: burger fast-casual has high turnover, so chairs and tabletops must be sturdy, durable, easy to clean and grease-resistant; diner booths must echo the retro warm tone; seat density must be high; fabrics must be wear- and stain-resistant.

Solution: cream-yellow upholstered diner booths with white tables along the walls, enclosed and high-density; lightweight chairs for open seating; bar stools at the counter; stain- and wear-resistant upholstery with grease-wipe tabletops; metal legs rust-treated.

Result: cream booths with sunset lighting and neon signage form a unified retro diner atmosphere; stain-resistant furniture suits high-frequency, high-grease burger service; high seat density boosts turnover; the whole balances retro mood with commercial durability.

title_zh: 迈阿密精品酒店中庭餐厅家具项目
title_en: Miami Boutique Hotel Atrium Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于美国迈阿密设计区一家精品酒店的中庭餐厅与酒廊，面积约360平方米，定位为明亮、艺术、度假感的酒店餐饮与社交空间。空间以白色拱券、水磨石地面、大量绿植与丝绒卡座为主，搭配木质餐椅与艺术画作，营造通透、温暖而精致的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要符合精品酒店餐饮的品质与艺术调性；卡座与餐椅要兼顾造型与久坐舒适；中庭多层挑高需要统一的家具语言；面料须耐磨易护理；不同区域（正餐、酒廊）需差异化又风格统一。

【我们的解决方案】沿拱券布置丝绒高背卡座搭配白色圆桌与木质餐椅，围合舒适、呼应建筑曲线；酒廊区配白色软包沙发与休闲椅；填充用高密度海绵，丝绒与布艺做防污处理；木作选用实木，与水磨石、绿植协调。

【落地效果】丝绒卡座、木椅与白色拱券、水磨石、绿植形成通透而温暖的统一氛围；多层中庭的家具语言一致；高背卡座提升了用餐私密与舒适；防污面料兼顾质感与维护；整体提升了酒店餐饮的艺术品质感。
desc_en:
The atrium restaurant and lounge of a boutique hotel in the Miami Design District, USA, approx. 360 sqm, positioned as a bright, artful, holiday-like hotel dining and social space. White arches, terrazzo floors, abundant greenery and velvet banquettes with wood dining chairs and artwork create an airy, warm and refined atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the quality and artistic tone of boutique-hotel dining; banquettes and chairs must balance form with long-stay comfort; the multi-level atrium needs a unified furniture language; fabrics must be wear-resistant and easy to maintain; dining and lounge zones must differ yet stay unified.

Solution: velvet high-back banquettes with white round tables and wood dining chairs along the arches, comfortable and echoing the architecture; white upholstered sofas and lounge chairs in the lounge; high-density foam fill with stain-treated velvet and fabric; solid woodwork coordinated with terrazzo and greenery.

Result: velvet banquettes and wood chairs with white arches, terrazzo and greenery form an airy, warm and unified atmosphere; the multi-level atrium shares one furniture language; high-back banquettes enhance dining privacy and comfort; stain-resistant fabrics balance texture and upkeep; the whole elevates the hotel dining experience.

title_zh: 雅加达屋顶花园餐厅家具项目
title_en: Jakarta Rooftop Garden Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于印度尼西亚雅加达一家屋顶花园餐厅，面积约400平方米（含露台与半室外用餐区），定位为绿意盎然、自然通透的热带花园餐饮空间。空间以暖色陶土地面、弧形木格栅天花、大面积玻璃与丰富绿植为主，营造自然、放松而温暖的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要契合热带花园的自然调性、耐候性强；半室外/露台区须防潮防晒、用材耐用；木质餐椅要舒适且便于清洁；室内外风格要统一过渡；绿植环境下家具要防霉。

【我们的解决方案】用材以实木与藤编为主，呼应自然花园氛围；半室外区采用防腐处理木餐椅搭配耐候桌面，防潮防晒；玻璃幕墙侧布置原木桌椅，引景入室；坐垫用速干防潮面料；金属件做防腐处理。

【落地效果】实木/藤编餐椅与木格栅天花、绿植、玻璃幕墙形成自然通透的花园氛围；防腐处理家具适应热带高温高湿；室内外风格统一过渡；速干坐垫便于雨季维护；整体兼顾自然体验与商业耐用。
desc_en:
A rooftop garden restaurant in Jakarta, Indonesia, approx. 400 sqm (terrace and semi-outdoor dining), positioned as a lush, naturally airy tropical garden dining space. Warm terracotta floors, curved timber-batten ceilings, large glazing and abundant greenery create a natural, relaxed and warm dining atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the tropical garden tone and be weather-resistant; semi-outdoor and terrace zones must be moisture- and sun-proof with durable materials; wood chairs must be comfortable and easy to clean; indoor and outdoor styles must transition seamlessly; furniture must resist mould in a planted environment.

Solution: solid wood and rattan as main materials echoing the garden; rot-treated wood chairs with weatherproof tabletops in semi-outdoor zones; solid-wood tables and chairs by the glazing to draw the view in; quick-dry moisture-resistant cushions; metal parts anti-corrosion treated.

Result: wood and rattan chairs with timber-batten ceilings, greenery and glazing form a natural, airy garden atmosphere; treated furniture suits tropical heat and humidity; indoor and outdoor transition seamlessly; quick-dry cushions ease rainy-season upkeep; the whole balances a natural experience with commercial durability.

title_zh: 洛杉矶酒店鸡尾酒吧·Lounge家具项目
title_en: Los Angeles Hotel Cocktail Bar & Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于美国洛杉矶市中心一家精品酒店的鸡尾酒吧与Lounge，面积约240平方米，定位为暖调、复古、富有戏剧感的高端社交饮酒空间。空间以赤陶／粉调灰泥墙面、抽象艺术、深色丝绒座椅与台灯为主，搭配淡紫瓷砖吧台，营造浓郁而考究的氛围。

【客户核心需求】Lounge座椅要松弛舒适、适合长时小酌；卡座与单椅要呼应暖调复古主题；吧台高脚椅须皮质/丝绒耐磨；面料须耐磨易护理；灯光偏暗，家具要靠造型与质感出彩。

【我们的解决方案】Lounge区配深色丝绒单人休闲椅与低矮卡座沙发，搭配小圆鸡尾酒桌，松弛舒适；吧台区设皮面高脚椅；卡座沿墙布置提升坐位密度；丝绒与皮革做防污处理，填充用高密度海绵。

【落地效果】深色丝绒座椅、皮面吧凳与赤陶墙、抽象画、台灯形成暖调复古而戏剧化的统一氛围；低矮休闲椅与卡座适合长时社交小酌；防污耐磨面料兼顾质感与维护；整体营造出高端而私密的酒吧Lounge体验。
desc_en:
A cocktail bar and lounge inside a boutique hotel in downtown Los Angeles, USA, approx. 240 sqm, positioned as a warm, retro, dramatic high-end social drinking space. Terracotta and blush clay-plaster walls, abstract art, dark velvet seating and table lamps with a lilac-tiled bar create a rich, refined atmosphere.

Client needs: lounge seating must be relaxed and comfortable for long drinks; booths and chairs must echo the warm retro theme; bar stools must use wear-resistant leather or velvet; fabrics must be wear-resistant and easy to maintain; with dim lighting, furniture must stand out through form and texture.

Solution: dark velvet lounge armchairs and low banquette sofas with small round cocktail tables in the lounge, relaxed and comfortable; leather bar stools at the counter; wall banquettes to raise seat density; stain-treated velvet and leather with high-density foam fill.

Result: dark velvet seating and leather stools with terracotta walls, abstract art and table lamps form a unified warm, retro and dramatic atmosphere; low lounge chairs and banquettes suit long social drinking; stain-resistant durable fabrics balance texture and upkeep; the whole creates a high-end, intimate bar-lounge experience.

title_zh: 旧金山科技公司总部办公家具项目
title_en: San Francisco Tech Company Headquarters Office Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于美国旧金山市中心一家成长型科技公司的总部办公空间，面积约1200平方米，定位为开放、协作、注重员工健康与品牌文化的现代办公环境。空间以浅木色、白色与品牌绿点缀为主，结合大面积落地玻璃、绿植墙与灵活隔断，营造明亮、专注而富有活力的办公氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需支持开放工位、协作区、专注电话亭、休闲茶水区等多种办公场景；座椅须符合人体工学，满足员工每日8小时以上久坐健康需求；用材要环保（低VOC）、通过商用耐用标准；整体风格须呼应品牌调性并便于后期工位扩展。

【我们的解决方案】开放工位区配置可升降办公桌搭配高靠背人体工学网椅，支持坐立交替办公；协作区布置模块化沙发与可移动茶几，灵活组合；专注电话亭内置软包单椅与小桌；茶水休闲区采用浅木长桌、吧台高脚椅与布艺休闲椅；所有面料与板材选用低VOC环保材质，通过商用级耐用与阻燃测试。

【落地效果】可升降桌与人体工学椅显著改善了员工久坐疲劳，健康满意度提升；模块化协作家具让团队会议与头脑风暴更高效；电话亭解决了开放办公的专注与隐私痛点；浅木色与品牌绿家具强化了企业文化辨识度；环保用材契合公司ESG承诺，整体在灵活性、健康与品牌表达间取得平衡。
desc_en:
The headquarters of a growth-stage tech company in downtown San Francisco, USA, approx. 1,200 sqm, positioned as an open, collaborative modern workplace focused on employee wellbeing and brand culture. Light wood, white and brand-green accents with floor-to-ceiling glass, green walls and flexible partitions create a bright, focused and energetic office atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must support open workstations, collaboration zones, focus phone booths and a pantry lounge; chairs must be ergonomic for 8+ hours of daily seated work; materials must be eco-friendly (low-VOC) and meet commercial durability standards; the style must echo the brand and allow future desk expansion.

Solution: height-adjustable sit-stand desks with high-back ergonomic mesh chairs in open workstations; modular sofas with movable coffee tables in collaboration zones; upholstered single chairs with small tables in focus phone booths; light-wood communal tables, bar stools and fabric lounge chairs in the pantry; all fabrics and boards in low-VOC eco materials, commercial-durability and fire tested.

Result: sit-stand desks and ergonomic chairs markedly reduced sedentary fatigue and raised wellbeing scores; modular collaboration furniture made meetings and brainstorming more effective; phone booths solved the focus and privacy pain points of open offices; light wood and brand-green furniture reinforced corporate identity; eco materials aligned with the company's ESG commitments, balancing flexibility, health and brand expression.

title_zh: 迪拜五星级酒店大堂吧家具项目
title_en: Dubai Five-Star Hotel Lobby Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于阿联酋迪拜一家五星级酒店的大堂吧与迎宾休息区，面积约500平方米，定位为奢华、典雅、融合阿拉伯元素与现代设计的高端接待空间。空间以大理石地面、金色金属线条、香槟色丝绒与水晶吊灯为主，搭配几何纹样地毯与定制软装，营造尊贵而温暖的待客氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具须匹配五星级酒店的奢华品质与品牌形象；大堂吧座椅要兼顾迎宾停留的舒适与高频接待的耐用；用材要高端且经得起近距离审视；需适应炎热气候下高强度空调环境；不同区域（迎宾、休息、吧台）需差异化又风格统一。

【我们的解决方案】迎宾休息区配置香槟色丝绒高背沙发与单人扶手椅，搭配金色金属脚大理石面茶几，尊贵舒适；大堂吧设皮面金属脚高脚椅与定制吧台；休息区点缀软包圆凳与几何纹样靠枕；填充采用高密度海绵，丝绒与皮革做防污耐磨处理，金属件做防氧化电镀。

【落地效果】香槟丝绒沙发、金色金属与大理石、水晶灯形成奢华典雅的统一调性；高背沙发为宾客提供舒适私密的迎宾体验；皮面高脚椅经受高频接待考验；防氧化金属与耐磨面料适应迪拜气候与高强度使用；整体显著提升了酒店大堂的尊贵品质感与品牌形象。
desc_en:
The lobby lounge and welcome seating area of a five-star hotel in Dubai, UAE, approx. 500 sqm, positioned as a luxurious, elegant high-end reception space blending Arabian elements with modern design. Marble floors, gold metal lines, champagne velvet and crystal chandeliers with geometric-pattern carpets and bespoke soft furnishings create a prestigious yet warm hospitality atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the five-star luxury quality and brand image; lobby-bar seating must balance welcome-stay comfort with high-frequency reception durability; materials must be premium and bear close scrutiny; furniture must suit intense air-conditioning in a hot climate; the welcome, lounge and bar zones must differ yet stay unified.

Solution: champagne velvet high-back sofas and armchairs with gold-leg marble-top coffee tables in the welcome lounge, prestigious and comfortable; leather metal-leg bar stools with a bespoke counter in the lobby bar; upholstered round ottomans and geometric cushions as accents; high-density foam fill, stain- and wear-treated velvet and leather, anti-oxidation plated metal.

Result: champagne velvet sofas, gold metal, marble and crystal lighting form a unified luxurious, elegant tone; high-back sofas give guests a comfortable, private welcome; leather bar stools withstand frequent reception use; anti-oxidation metal and wear-resistant fabrics suit Dubai's climate and heavy use; the whole markedly elevates the lobby's prestige and brand image.

title_zh: 巴塞罗那屋顶酒吧户外家具项目
title_en: Barcelona Rooftop Bar Outdoor Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于西班牙巴塞罗那一家精品酒店的屋顶酒吧与户外露台，面积约350平方米，定位为地中海风情、轻松惬意、可俯瞰城市天际线的户外社交饮酒空间。空间以暖陶土色、藤编、米白遮阳棚与大量绿植为主，搭配落日暖光与户外吧台，营造放松而浪漫的露台氛围。

【客户核心需求】户外家具须全面耐候——防晒、防雨、抗紫外线、防盐雾（近海气候）；座椅要松弛舒适、适合长时社交小酌；风格要呼应地中海与藤编自然质感；坐垫面料须速干防霉、易清洁；家具要兼具轻便（便于按天气调整布局）与稳固抗风。

【我们的解决方案】露台区配置全天候编织藤休闲椅与低矮沙发，搭配防腐木与岩板面茶几，松弛耐候；用餐区设铝合金框架餐椅与户外餐桌，轻便抗风；户外吧台配防水高脚椅；坐垫采用速干海绵与抗紫外线防霉面料；金属框架做防盐雾喷涂处理，确保近海环境耐用。

【落地效果】编织藤椅、低矮沙发与暖陶土色、遮阳棚、绿植和城市天际线形成惬意的地中海露台氛围；全天候家具经受日晒雨淋与海风考验仍保持良好状态；速干坐垫便于多变天气下快速恢复使用；铝合金餐椅轻便又抗风；整体兼顾度假体验、抗风耐候与商业耐用，成为城市热门日落打卡地。
desc_en:
The rooftop bar and outdoor terrace of a boutique hotel in Barcelona, Spain, approx. 350 sqm, positioned as a Mediterranean, relaxed outdoor social drinking space overlooking the city skyline. Warm terracotta tones, rattan, cream awnings and abundant greenery with sunset lighting and an outdoor bar create a relaxed, romantic terrace atmosphere.

Client needs: outdoor furniture must be fully weatherproof — sun-, rain-, UV- and salt-mist-resistant (coastal climate); seating must be relaxed and comfortable for long social drinks; the style must echo Mediterranean and natural rattan textures; cushion fabrics must be quick-dry, mould-resistant and easy to clean; furniture must be both lightweight (to rearrange by weather) and stable against wind.

Solution: all-weather woven rattan lounge chairs and low sofas with rot-resistant wood and sintered-stone coffee tables on the terrace, relaxed and weatherproof; aluminium-frame dining chairs and outdoor tables in the dining zone, light and wind-resistant; waterproof bar stools at the outdoor bar; quick-dry foam with UV- and mould-resistant fabrics; salt-mist-resistant coated metal frames for coastal durability.

Result: woven rattan chairs and low sofas with terracotta tones, awnings, greenery and the skyline form a relaxed Mediterranean terrace atmosphere; all-weather furniture holds up under sun, rain and sea breeze; quick-dry cushions return to use fast in changeable weather; aluminium chairs are light yet wind-resistant; the whole balances a holiday experience, weather resistance and commercial durability, becoming a popular city sunset spot.

title_zh: 米兰米其林意式餐厅家具项目
title_en: Milan Michelin Italian Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于意大利米兰一家米其林星级意式餐厅，面积约260平方米，定位为现代意式高级料理（fine dining）空间，强调精致、安静、富有仪式感的就餐体验。空间以胡桃木饰面、米色微水泥墙、黄铜灯具与定制羊毛地毯为主，搭配大幅当代艺术，营造低调奢华的氛围。

【客户核心需求】座椅必须满足两小时以上品鉴菜单的久坐舒适；造型要现代精致、与艺术与黄铜元素呼应；面料须高端且耐磨易护理、通过欧盟阻燃标准；桌间距与坐感要保障用餐私密；用材须经得起米其林级别的近距离审视。

【我们的解决方案】主厅采用胡桃木框架圆背扶手餐椅，搭配高密度海绵与意大利绒面料，久坐舒适；靠墙设低背软包卡座提升私密；每桌配定制实木餐桌，桌面做防污处理；所有面料通过欧盟阻燃测试并做防污处理，木作采用环保实木与手工打磨工艺。

【落地效果】胡桃木扶手椅、绒面卡座与微水泥墙、黄铜灯、当代艺术形成低调奢华的统一调性；圆背扶手椅为长时品鉴提供出色支撑；卡座强化用餐私密；阻燃防污面料兼顾质感与维护；整体达到了米其林餐厅对舒适、精致与耐用的综合要求。
desc_en:
A Michelin-starred Italian restaurant in Milan, Italy, approx. 260 sqm, positioned as a modern Italian fine-dining space emphasising a refined, quiet and ceremonial dining experience. Walnut paneling, beige micro-cement walls, brass lighting and bespoke wool rugs with large contemporary artworks create an understated luxurious atmosphere.

Client needs: seating must be comfortable for 2+ hour tasting menus; the form must be modern and refined, echoing the art and brass; fabrics must be premium, wear-resistant, easy to maintain and meet EU fire standards; table spacing and seating must ensure dining privacy; materials must bear Michelin-level close scrutiny.

Solution: walnut-frame round-back armchairs with high-density foam and Italian velvet in the main hall for long-stay comfort; low-back upholstered banquettes along the walls for privacy; bespoke solid-wood tables per setting with stain-treated tops; all fabrics EU fire-tested and stain-treated, woodwork in eco solid wood with hand-finished craft.

Result: walnut armchairs and velvet banquettes with micro-cement walls, brass lighting and contemporary art form an understated luxurious tone; round-back armchairs support long tastings; banquettes reinforce privacy; fire-rated stain-resistant fabrics balance texture and upkeep; the whole meets a Michelin restaurant's combined demands for comfort, refinement and durability.

title_zh: 巴黎精品酒店客房与套房家具项目
title_en: Paris Boutique Hotel Guestroom & Suite Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于法国巴黎玛黑区一家精品酒店，涉及40余间客房与套房及部分公共休息区，定位为融合巴黎古典与现代设计的优雅住宿空间。空间以护墙板、人字拼木地板、暖灰与藏蓝软装、黄铜五金为主，营造典雅、温暖而私密的居住氛围。

【客户核心需求】客房家具须兼顾美观与酒店高频使用的耐用；床头、休闲椅、写字桌等需在有限房间面积内合理布局；软包与木作要呼应巴黎古典调性；面料须阻燃防污、易护理；批量生产须保证品质统一与交付周期。

【我们的解决方案】客房配置软包床屏、藏蓝/暖灰布艺休闲椅、实木写字桌与床尾凳，紧凑而优雅；套房增设小型沙发与圆几；木作采用与护墙板呼应的实木线条与黄铜五金；面料通过阻燃测试并做防污处理；建立标准化生产工艺确保40余间客房品质统一。

【落地效果】软包床屏、布艺休闲椅与护墙板、人字拼地板、黄铜五金形成典雅温暖的统一调性；紧凑布局在有限房间内兼顾功能与美观；阻燃防污面料适应酒店高频使用；标准化生产保证了批量客房的品质一致与按期交付。
desc_en:
A boutique hotel in the Marais, Paris, France, covering 40+ guestrooms and suites plus some public lounge areas, positioned as an elegant lodging space blending Parisian classic and modern design. Wall paneling, herringbone wood floors, warm-grey and navy soft furnishings and brass hardware create an elegant, warm and private living atmosphere.

Client needs: guestroom furniture must balance beauty with the durability of high-frequency hotel use; headboards, lounge chairs and writing desks must fit sensibly within limited room areas; upholstery and woodwork must echo the Parisian classic tone; fabrics must be fire-rated, stain-resistant and easy to maintain; batch production must ensure consistent quality and delivery schedule.

Solution: upholstered headboards, navy and warm-grey fabric lounge chairs, solid-wood writing desks and bench ends in guestrooms, compact yet elegant; small sofas and round tables added in suites; woodwork in solid-wood mouldings echoing the paneling with brass hardware; fabrics fire-tested and stain-treated; standardised production to keep 40+ rooms consistent.

Result: upholstered headboards and fabric lounge chairs with paneling, herringbone floors and brass hardware form an elegant, warm and unified tone; the compact layout balances function and beauty in limited rooms; fire-rated stain-resistant fabrics suit high-frequency hotel use; standardised production ensured consistent quality and on-time delivery across the rooms.

title_zh: 首尔网红咖啡馆家具项目
title_en: Seoul Instagrammable Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于韩国首尔圣水洞的一家网红咖啡馆，面积约200平方米，定位为面向年轻客群、注重拍照分享与社交属性的设计型咖啡空间。空间以奶油色微水泥、原木、不锈钢与柔和曲线为主，搭配大面积自然采光与造型灯具，营造柔和、治愈而具有记忆点的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具造型要有强烈的设计感与拍照记忆点；咖啡馆翻台较高，座椅须轻便耐用、便于清洁；不同区域（吧台、散座、长桌、临窗）需差异化座位；用材要呼应奶油色与曲线主题；预算需控制在合理范围。

【我们的解决方案】临窗区配奶油色曲线软包单椅与小圆桌，成为拍照打卡点；散座区选用原木餐椅搭配水磨石桌面，轻便耐用；吧台区设不锈钢与木结合的高脚椅；中部设原木长桌满足拼坐与办公；软包面料做防污处理，桌面耐磨易擦。

【落地效果】奶油色曲线单椅与微水泥、原木、造型灯形成柔和治愈的统一调性，成为社交平台高频出镜的打卡点；轻便餐椅与耐磨桌面适配高翻台；多样化座位满足拍照、社交、办公等不同需求；整体在预算内实现了设计感与商业实用的平衡。
desc_en:
An Instagrammable cafe in Seongsu-dong, Seoul, South Korea, approx. 200 sqm, positioned as a design-led coffee space for young customers focused on photo-sharing and socialising. Cream micro-cement, solid wood, stainless steel and soft curves with ample daylight and sculptural lighting create a soft, soothing and memorable atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must have strong design appeal and photogenic identity; with high turnover, seating must be lightweight, durable and easy to clean; bar, open seating, communal table and window zones need distinct seats; materials must echo the cream and curved theme; budget must stay reasonable.

Solution: cream curved upholstered single chairs with small round tables at the windows as a photo spot; solid-wood chairs with terrazzo tabletops in open seating, light and durable; stainless-and-wood bar stools at the counter; a solid-wood communal table for shared use and working; stain-treated upholstery and wear-resistant, wipe-clean tabletops.

Result: cream curved chairs with micro-cement, wood and sculptural lighting form a soft, soothing and unified tone, becoming a frequent social-media photo spot; lightweight chairs and durable tabletops suit high turnover; varied seating serves photos, socialising and working; the whole balances design appeal and commercial practicality within budget.

title_zh: 巴厘岛海滩餐厅Beach Club户外家具项目
title_en: Bali Beach Club Outdoor Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于印度尼西亚巴厘岛的一家海滩餐厅暨Beach Club，面积约600平方米（含沙滩区、泳池区与半室外用餐区），定位为热带度假、慵懒奢华、可观海看日落的高端户外体验空间。空间以柚木、天然藤编、米白棉麻与大量绿植为主，搭配茅草凉亭与泳池，营造热带海岛的放松氛围。

【客户核心需求】户外家具须极致耐候——抗紫外线、防雨、防盐雾、抗潮，适应海岛高温高湿与近海腐蚀；泳池区座椅要防水、可日光浴；用材要呼应柚木与藤编的自然质感；坐垫面料须速干防霉；家具要兼顾度假慵懒坐感与商业耐用。

【我们的解决方案】用餐区配置柚木餐椅与户外餐桌，耐候稳固；休闲区布置全天候藤编沙发与日光躺椅，搭配速干坐垫；泳池区设防水躺床与遮阳伞；坐垫采用速干海绵与抗紫外线防霉面料；金属件做防盐雾处理，柚木做户外油养护，确保海岛环境长效耐用。

【落地效果】柚木餐椅、藤编沙发与茅草凉亭、泳池、绿植和海景形成慵懒奢华的热带度假氛围；全天候家具经受海岛烈日、暴雨与海风考验仍保持良好；速干坐垫便于泳池区频繁使用；日光躺床与遮阳伞成为客人观海看日落的热门区域；整体兼顾度假体验与近海商业耐用。
desc_en:
A beach restaurant and beach club in Bali, Indonesia, approx. 600 sqm (beach, pool and semi-outdoor dining zones), positioned as a tropical-resort, laid-back-luxury, ocean- and sunset-view high-end outdoor space. Teak, natural rattan, off-white cotton-linen and abundant greenery with thatched gazebos and a pool create a relaxed tropical-island atmosphere.

Client needs: outdoor furniture must be extremely weatherproof — UV-, rain-, salt-mist- and damp-resistant for island heat, humidity and coastal corrosion; pool seating must be waterproof and sunbathing-friendly; materials must echo teak and rattan textures; cushion fabrics must be quick-dry and mould-resistant; furniture must balance laid-back resort comfort with commercial durability.

Solution: teak dining chairs and outdoor tables in the dining zone, weatherproof and stable; all-weather rattan sofas and sun loungers with quick-dry cushions in the lounge; waterproof daybeds and parasols at the pool; quick-dry foam with UV- and mould-resistant fabrics; salt-mist-treated metal and outdoor-oiled teak for long-lasting island durability.

Result: teak chairs, rattan sofas with thatched gazebos, pool, greenery and ocean views form a laid-back luxurious tropical-resort atmosphere; all-weather furniture holds up under island sun, heavy rain and sea breeze; quick-dry cushions suit frequent poolside use; sun loungers and parasols became a favourite ocean- and sunset-viewing spot; the whole balances a resort experience with coastal commercial durability.

title_zh: 伦敦金融机构办公家具项目
title_en: London Financial Firm Office Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于英国伦敦金融城一家资产管理公司的办公空间，面积约900平方米，定位为稳重、专业、彰显信任感的高端商务办公环境。空间以深木饰面、深蓝与灰色软装、皮革与黄铜元素为主，搭配会议室、高管办公室、接待区与开放工位，营造沉稳而有品质感的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具须体现金融机构的稳重与专业形象；会议与高管区座椅要高端、久坐舒适、皮质耐用；开放工位要符合人体工学；接待区要给客户留下信任与品质的第一印象；用材须高端耐用、通过英国BS阻燃与商用标准。

【我们的解决方案】会议室配置深色皮面高背会议椅与实木会议桌；高管办公室设真皮大班椅与实木办公桌；接待区布置深蓝皮革沙发与单椅、黄铜脚茶几；开放工位采用人体工学网椅与升降桌；皮革做耐磨防污处理，木作采用深色实木饰面，所有面料通过BS7176阻燃测试。

【落地效果】深色皮革座椅、实木办公桌与深蓝灰软装、黄铜元素形成稳重专业的统一调性；高背会议椅与大班椅兼顾形象与久坐舒适；接待区皮革沙发强化了客户的信任第一印象；人体工学工位改善了员工长时间办公体验；高端耐用用材契合金融机构的品质与合规要求。
desc_en:
An asset-management firm's office in the City of London, UK, approx. 900 sqm, positioned as a solid, professional high-end business environment conveying trust. Dark wood paneling, navy and grey soft furnishings, leather and brass with meeting rooms, executive offices, a reception and open workstations create a composed, quality atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must convey a financial firm's solidity and professionalism; meeting and executive seating must be premium, comfortable for long sittings and use durable leather; open workstations must be ergonomic; the reception must give clients a first impression of trust and quality; materials must be premium, durable and meet UK BS fire and commercial standards.

Solution: dark leather high-back meeting chairs with solid-wood tables in meeting rooms; genuine-leather executive chairs with solid-wood desks in executive offices; navy leather sofas and chairs with brass-leg coffee tables in reception; ergonomic mesh chairs and sit-stand desks at open workstations; wear- and stain-treated leather, dark solid-wood finishes, all fabrics BS7176 fire-tested.

Result: dark leather seating and solid-wood desks with navy-grey furnishings and brass form a solid, professional unified tone; high-back meeting and executive chairs balance image with long-stay comfort; reception leather sofas reinforce a trustworthy first impression; ergonomic workstations improved long working sessions; premium durable materials meet the firm's quality and compliance needs.

title_zh: 曼谷现代泰式餐厅家具项目
title_en: Bangkok Modern Thai Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于泰国曼谷一家现代泰式餐厅，面积约240平方米，定位为融合泰式传统工艺与现代设计的中高端餐饮空间。空间以柚木、藤编、暖铜、热带绿植与手工陶艺为主，搭配暖色灯光，营造热带、温暖而精致的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要呈现泰式传统工艺（藤编、柚木）与现代设计的融合；座椅须兼顾正餐久坐舒适与较高翻台；面料与藤编要耐用易护理，适应曼谷高温高湿；不同区域（散座、卡座、吧台）需差异化；整体要呼应热带暖调主题。

【我们的解决方案】散座区采用藤编靠背柚木餐椅搭配实木餐桌，呼应泰式工艺、轻便耐用；靠墙设暖色布艺软包卡座提升坐位密度；吧台区配藤编与金属结合的高脚椅；藤编做防潮处理、布艺做防污处理，柚木做防潮养护，适应高湿气候。

【落地效果】藤编柚木餐椅、暖色卡座与暖铜灯、热带绿植、手工陶艺形成温暖精致的泰式现代氛围；藤编工艺强化了在地文化记忆点；防潮防污用材适应曼谷气候与高频运营；差异化座位满足不同用餐场景；整体在文化表达与商业耐用间取得平衡。
desc_en:
A modern Thai restaurant in Bangkok, Thailand, approx. 240 sqm, positioned as a mid-to-high-end dining space blending traditional Thai craft with modern design. Teak, rattan, warm copper, tropical greenery and handmade ceramics with warm lighting create a tropical, warm and refined dining atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must present a fusion of traditional Thai craft (rattan, teak) and modern design; seating must balance full-service long-stay comfort with higher turnover; fabrics and rattan must be durable and easy to maintain in Bangkok's heat and humidity; open, booth and bar zones need distinction; the whole must echo the warm tropical theme.

Solution: rattan-back teak dining chairs with solid-wood tables in open seating, echoing Thai craft, light and durable; warm fabric upholstered booths along the walls to raise seat density; rattan-and-metal bar stools at the counter; moisture-treated rattan, stain-treated fabric and moisture-cured teak for the humid climate.

Result: rattan-teak chairs and warm booths with copper lighting, tropical greenery and handmade ceramics form a warm, refined modern-Thai atmosphere; rattan craft reinforces local cultural identity; moisture- and stain-resistant materials suit Bangkok's climate and high-frequency operation; differentiated seating serves varied dining scenes; the whole balances cultural expression with commercial durability.

title_zh: 墨尔本第三波精品咖啡馆家具项目
title_en: Melbourne Third-Wave Specialty Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于澳大利亚墨尔本Fitzroy区的一家第三波精品咖啡馆，面积约160平方米，定位为专业、工业风、注重咖啡本身的社区精品咖啡空间。空间以裸露红砖、黑色钢框、回收木与水磨石为主，搭配开放式吧台与手冲展示区，营造专业、随性而有质感的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要呼应工业风与回收木的质感、强调可持续；咖啡馆翻台高，座椅须结实耐用、便于清洁；开放吧台区需便于顾客观看咖啡制作；用材要环保（回收木/FSC认证）；不同区域（吧台、散座、临窗高桌）需差异化座位。

【我们的解决方案】吧台区配黑色钢框高脚凳，便于观看手冲；散座区选用回收木餐椅搭配水磨石桌面，结实耐用；临窗设高桌与高脚凳；中部设回收木长桌满足拼坐；木作采用FSC认证/回收木材，金属件做哑光防锈处理，桌面耐磨易清洁。

【落地效果】黑色钢框高脚凳、回收木餐椅与裸砖、水磨石形成专业工业风的统一调性；开放吧台高凳强化了手冲互动体验；回收木与FSC用材契合可持续理念，受到注重环保的客群认同；结实耐用的桌椅适配高翻台；整体兼顾专业咖啡调性与商业耐用。
desc_en:
A third-wave specialty cafe in Fitzroy, Melbourne, Australia, approx. 160 sqm, positioned as a professional, industrial, coffee-focused community specialty space. Exposed red brick, black steel frames, reclaimed wood and terrazzo with an open bar and a pour-over display create a professional, casual yet textured atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must echo the industrial look and reclaimed-wood texture and stress sustainability; with high turnover, seating must be sturdy, durable and easy to clean; the open bar must let guests watch coffee being made; materials must be eco-friendly (reclaimed/FSC-certified); bar, open seating and window high-tables need distinct seats.

Solution: black steel-frame stools at the bar for watching pour-over; reclaimed-wood chairs with terrazzo tabletops in open seating, sturdy and durable; high tables and stools at the windows; a reclaimed-wood communal table for shared use; FSC-certified and reclaimed wood, matte rust-treated metal, wear-resistant easy-clean tabletops.

Result: black steel stools and reclaimed-wood chairs with exposed brick and terrazzo form a professional industrial unified tone; open-bar stools enhance the pour-over interaction; reclaimed and FSC materials align with sustainability and resonate with eco-conscious customers; sturdy durable furniture suits high turnover; the whole balances a professional coffee tone with commercial durability.

title_zh: 马尔代夫度假村全日餐厅家具项目
title_en: Maldives Resort All-Day Dining Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于马尔代夫一家奢华海岛度假村的全日餐厅与海景酒廊，面积约550平方米（含半室外临海用餐区），定位为奢华、自然、可全景观海的度假餐饮空间。空间以柚木、天然藤编、米白棉麻、贝壳与珊瑚色软装为主，结合大面积开敞设计与海风，营造放松而精致的海岛奢华氛围。

【客户核心需求】半室外临海家具须极致耐候——抗盐雾、防潮、抗紫外线，适应海岛全开敞高湿环境；座椅要兼顾度假舒适与全日餐厅高频使用；用材要呼应柚木藤编自然质感与海岛奢华定位；面料须速干防霉、易护理；室内外风格须统一过渡。

【我们的解决方案】临海用餐区采用柚木餐椅与藤编扶手椅，搭配耐候实木/岩板餐桌；酒廊区布置藤编低背沙发与休闲椅，配速干珊瑚色坐垫；填充用速干海绵，面料抗紫外线防霉；柚木做户外油养护、金属与五金做防盐雾处理，确保全开敞海岛环境长效耐用。

【落地效果】柚木与藤编餐椅、低背沙发与贝壳珊瑚色软装、海景形成奢华自然的海岛度假氛围；耐候家具经受盐雾、高湿与烈日考验仍保持良好；速干坐垫便于临海高频使用；室内外风格统一过渡；整体兼顾度假奢华体验与全日餐厅的商业耐用要求。
desc_en:
The all-day dining restaurant and ocean-view lounge of a luxury island resort in the Maldives, approx. 550 sqm (including a semi-outdoor seaside dining zone), positioned as a luxurious, natural, panoramic-ocean resort dining space. Teak, natural rattan, off-white cotton-linen, shell and coral-toned soft furnishings with open-plan design and sea breeze create a relaxed yet refined island-luxury atmosphere.

Client needs: semi-outdoor seaside furniture must be extremely weatherproof — salt-mist-, damp- and UV-resistant for the fully open, humid island setting; seating must balance resort comfort with all-day high-frequency use; materials must echo teak-rattan textures and island luxury; fabrics must be quick-dry, mould-resistant and easy to maintain; indoor and outdoor styles must transition seamlessly.

Solution: teak dining chairs and rattan armchairs with weatherproof solid-wood and sintered-stone tables in the seaside dining zone; rattan low-back sofas and lounge chairs with quick-dry coral cushions in the lounge; quick-dry foam with UV- and mould-resistant fabrics; outdoor-oiled teak and salt-mist-treated metal and hardware for long-lasting durability in the open island environment.

Result: teak and rattan chairs, low-back sofas with shell and coral soft furnishings and ocean views form a luxurious, natural island-resort atmosphere; weatherproof furniture holds up under salt mist, humidity and intense sun; quick-dry cushions suit frequent seaside use; indoor and outdoor transition seamlessly; the whole balances a luxurious resort experience with all-day commercial durability.

title_zh: 柏林创意机构联合办公家具项目
title_en: Berlin Creative Agency Coworking Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于德国柏林一家创意广告机构的联合办公空间，面积约800平方米，定位为开放、灵活、富有创意活力且注重可持续的现代办公环境。空间以裸露混凝土、回收木、亮色点缀与大量绿植为主，结合灵活隔断与多功能区，营造自由、随性而高效的创意氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具须支持开放工位、头脑风暴区、休闲社交区、专注舱等多元创意办公场景；座椅要符合人体工学、满足久坐；用材要可持续（回收木/低VOC）并呼应工业创意调性；家具要灵活可移动、便于按项目重组空间；预算需兼顾品质与规模。

【我们的解决方案】开放工位配人体工学网椅与可拼接办公桌；头脑风暴区布置带轮可移动白板、模块化软凳与高桌；休闲社交区采用回收木长桌、亮色布艺休闲椅与软包卡座；专注舱内置软包单椅与小桌；木作采用回收木/FSC材料，面料低VOC环保并做防污处理。

【落地效果】回收木长桌、亮色休闲椅与裸混凝土、绿植形成自由而有活力的创意调性；模块化与带轮家具让团队可按项目快速重组空间；人体工学工位改善了久坐体验；专注舱缓解了开放办公的专注痛点；可持续用材契合机构的环保价值观，整体兼顾创意灵活、健康与品牌表达。
desc_en:
The coworking space of a creative advertising agency in Berlin, Germany, approx. 800 sqm, positioned as an open, flexible, creatively energetic and sustainability-minded modern workplace. Exposed concrete, reclaimed wood, bright accents and abundant greenery with flexible partitions and multi-use zones create a free, casual yet productive creative atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must support open workstations, brainstorming zones, social lounges and focus pods; chairs must be ergonomic for long sittings; materials must be sustainable (reclaimed/low-VOC) and echo the industrial-creative tone; furniture must be flexible and movable to reconfigure by project; budget must balance quality and scale.

Solution: ergonomic mesh chairs and joinable desks at open workstations; mobile whiteboards on castors, modular stools and high tables in brainstorming zones; reclaimed-wood communal tables, bright fabric lounge chairs and upholstered booths in the social lounge; upholstered single chairs with small tables in focus pods; reclaimed/FSC woodwork, low-VOC eco fabrics, stain-treated.

Result: reclaimed-wood tables and bright lounge chairs with exposed concrete and greenery form a free, energetic creative tone; modular and castored furniture lets teams quickly reconfigure by project; ergonomic workstations improved long sittings; focus pods eased the concentration pain points of open offices; sustainable materials align with the agency's eco values, balancing creative flexibility, health and brand expression.

title_zh: 上海高端创意粤菜餐厅家具项目
title_en: Shanghai High-End Creative Cantonese Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于中国上海一家高端创意粤菜餐厅，面积约380平方米，定位为融合海派文化与现代东方美学的精致正餐与商务宴请空间。空间以深色木格栅、墨绿与金色软装、大理石与艺术装置为主，搭配独立包厢与散座大厅，营造考究、私密而有格调的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具须体现海派精致与现代东方美学；包厢区要私密、高端、适合商务宴请；散座区座椅要兼顾舒适与翻台；面料与皮革须耐磨易护理、防油污（粤菜场景）、通过国标商用标准；整体调性要统一且有品质感。

【我们的解决方案】散座大厅采用深木框架圆背软包餐椅搭配大理石面圆桌，舒适耐用；包厢区定制墨绿丝绒高背扶手椅与大型实木餐桌，私密高端；靠墙设软包卡座提升坐位密度；皮革与丝绒做防污耐磨处理，桌面防油易清洁，木作采用深色实木格栅工艺。

【落地效果】深木圆背餐椅、墨绿丝绒扶手椅与木格栅、金色软装、大理石形成考究的海派现代东方调性；包厢丝绒扶手椅为商务宴请提供私密高端体验；防污防油面料适应粤菜高频运营；散座圆背椅兼顾舒适与翻台；整体在文化美学与商业耐用间取得高水准平衡。
desc_en:
A high-end creative Cantonese restaurant in Shanghai, China, approx. 380 sqm, positioned as a refined fine-dining and business-banquet space blending Shanghai-style (Haipai) culture with modern Eastern aesthetics. Dark timber screens, dark-green and gold soft furnishings, marble and art installations with private rooms and an open dining hall create a refined, private and stylish dining atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must express Haipai refinement and modern Eastern aesthetics; private rooms must be private, high-end and suited to business banquets; open-hall seating must balance comfort with turnover; fabric and leather must be wear-resistant, easy to maintain, grease-resistant (Cantonese cuisine) and meet national commercial standards; the tone must be unified and quality.

Solution: dark-wood frame round-back upholstered chairs with marble-top round tables in the open hall, comfortable and durable; bespoke dark-green velvet high-back armchairs with large solid-wood tables in private rooms, private and high-end; upholstered booths along the walls to raise seat density; stain- and wear-treated leather and velvet, grease-resistant easy-clean tabletops, dark solid-wood screen craft.

Result: dark-wood round-back chairs and dark-green velvet armchairs with timber screens, gold furnishings and marble form a refined Haipai modern-Eastern tone; private-room velvet armchairs give business banquets a private, high-end experience; stain- and grease-resistant fabrics suit high-frequency Cantonese operation; round-back chairs balance comfort with turnover; the whole achieves a high-level balance of cultural aesthetics and commercial durability.

title_zh: 迪拜国际金融区企业总部办公家具项目
title_en: Dubai DIFC Corporate Headquarters Office Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于阿联酋迪拜国际金融中心（DIFC）一家跨国咨询公司的区域总部，面积约1500平方米，定位为高端、稳重、彰显国际化品牌形象的现代办公空间。空间以胡桃木饰面、香槟金属、米色石材与深蓝点缀为主，结合落地玻璃幕墙与城市天际线景观，营造专业、尊贵而高效的办公氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需匹配国际顶级金融区的高端商务形象；要覆盖高管办公室、开放工位、董事会议室、商务洽谈区、接待大堂等多种场景；座椅须符合人体工学、满足每日长时办公；用材须耐用、阻燃、易护理，并能适应迪拜高温干燥气候；交付与现场安装须符合当地工程标准与工期。

【我们的解决方案】高管办公室配置真皮高背行政椅搭配胡桃木大班台；开放工位区采用可升降办公桌搭配高靠背人体工学网椅，支持坐立交替办公；董事会议室定制长条会议桌搭配真皮中背会议椅；商务洽谈与接待区布置米色软包沙发、单人休闲椅与香槟金属茶几；皮革与面料选用阻燃防污商用级材质，木作做防潮防裂处理以适应干燥气候。

【落地效果】胡桃木大班台、真皮行政椅与香槟金属、米色石材形成稳重尊贵的国际化办公调性；可升降桌与人体工学椅显著改善了员工久坐疲劳；阻燃防污面料与防裂木作经受住了迪拜气候与高频使用的考验；统一的家具语言强化了企业品牌形象，并获得客户对后续分支办公室的持续复购。
desc_en:
The regional headquarters of a multinational consultancy in the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), UAE, approx. 1500 sqm, positioned as a high-end, composed, internationally branded modern office. Walnut veneer, champagne metal, beige stone and deep-blue accents with floor-to-ceiling glazing and skyline views create a professional, prestigious and efficient atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the high-end business image of a top global financial district; it must cover executive offices, open workstations, the boardroom, business meeting areas and the reception lobby; seating must be ergonomic for long daily working hours; materials must be durable, fire-rated and easy to maintain, suited to Dubai's hot, dry climate; delivery and on-site installation must meet local project standards and schedule.

Solution: leather high-back executive chairs with walnut executive desks in private offices; height-adjustable desks with high-back ergonomic mesh chairs in the open-plan area for sit-stand working; a bespoke long conference table with leather mid-back chairs in the boardroom; beige upholstered sofas, lounge chairs and champagne-metal coffee tables in meeting and reception areas; fire-rated, stain-resistant commercial leather and fabrics, with moisture- and crack-treated woodwork for the dry climate.

Result: walnut desks and leather executive chairs with champagne metal and beige stone form a composed, prestigious international office tone; height-adjustable desks and ergonomic chairs markedly reduced staff sitting fatigue; fire-rated stain-resistant fabrics and crack-treated woodwork withstood Dubai's climate and frequent use; a unified furniture language reinforced the corporate brand, earning repeat orders for the client's subsequent branch offices.

title_zh: 米兰精品设计酒店大堂与套房家具项目
title_en: Milan Boutique Design Hotel Lobby & Suite Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于意大利米兰布雷拉设计区的一家精品设计酒店，面积约1800平方米（含大堂、酒廊、餐厅及客房样板间），定位为意式优雅、现代克制而富有艺术感的高端住宿体验空间。空间以绿色大理石、暖木饰面、黄铜线条与丝绒软装为主，搭配米兰设计感家具与艺术灯具，营造精致、温暖而考究的氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具要呼应米兰设计之都的优雅调性与意式工艺质感；要覆盖大堂接待、酒廊、餐厅及客房等不同场景；客房与酒廊座椅须兼顾造型与久坐舒适；面料与皮革须耐磨易护理、符合欧盟阻燃标准；公共区高频使用，须经久耐用且风格统一。

【我们的解决方案】大堂与酒廊配置丝绒软包休闲椅、低矮沙发与黄铜脚大理石茶几，造型现代、坐感松弛；餐厅区采用暖木框架圆背餐椅搭配大理石圆桌；客房定制床头软包、休闲单椅与写字台椅，强调居住舒适感；丝绒与皮革做防污处理并通过欧盟阻燃测试，填充选用高密度海绵，木作为实木与饰面工艺。

【落地效果】丝绒休闲椅、圆背餐椅与绿色大理石、黄铜、暖木形成意式优雅的统一调性；大堂与酒廊家具松弛舒适、彰显品牌格调；阻燃防污面料兼顾了质感与维护成本；客房软装提升了住宿舒适度与客评分数；整体以米兰设计语言强化了精品酒店的艺术品质感。
desc_en:
A boutique design hotel in Milan's Brera design district, Italy, approx. 1800 sqm (lobby, lounge, restaurant and guest-room mock-ups), positioned as an Italian-elegant, modern-restrained yet artful high-end stay. Green marble, warm wood veneer, brass lines and velvet soft furnishings with design-led furniture and art lighting create a refined, warm and considered atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must echo the elegance and Italian craft of the design capital; it must cover reception, lounge, restaurant and guest rooms; room and lounge seating must balance form with long-stay comfort; fabric and leather must be wear-resistant, easy to maintain and meet EU fire standards; public areas see heavy use, so pieces must be durable and unified.

Solution: velvet upholstered lounge chairs, low sofas and brass-leg marble coffee tables in the lobby and lounge, modern and relaxed; warm-wood round-back dining chairs with marble round tables in the restaurant; bespoke headboards, lounge chairs and desk chairs for guest rooms emphasising residential comfort; stain-treated, EU fire-tested velvet and leather, high-density foam fill, and solid-wood and veneer craft.

Result: velvet lounge chairs and round-back dining chairs with green marble, brass and warm wood form a unified Italian-elegant tone; lobby and lounge furniture is relaxed and on-brand; fire-rated stain-resistant fabrics balance texture and upkeep; guest-room furnishings raised comfort and review scores; the whole reinforces the boutique hotel's artistic quality through Milanese design language.

title_zh: 巴塞罗那海滨屋顶酒吧户外家具项目
title_en: Barcelona Seaside Rooftop Bar Outdoor Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目位于西班牙巴塞罗那海滨一家酒店的屋顶酒吧与露台餐饮区，面积约500平方米，定位为地中海风情、阳光通透、面向海景的高端户外社交空间。空间以原木与藤编、米白与赤陶色坐垫、白色遮阳伞及大量绿植为主，搭配吧台与休闲卡座，营造轻松、度假而精致的氛围。

【客户核心需求】露台家具须强耐候——防晒、防水、防盐雾腐蚀（海滨环境）；座椅要轻松舒适、风格清新呼应地中海主题；要覆盖用餐区、吧台高脚区与休闲躺椅区等不同功能；坐垫须速干防霉、易清洁；家具须耐受日晒雨淋并经久耐用。

【我们的解决方案】用材以防腐实木、铝合金与人工藤编为主，兼顾质感与耐候；用餐区配藤编靠背户外餐椅搭配耐候桌面；吧台区设高脚椅；休闲区布置躺椅与低矮卡座沙发；坐垫选用速干防霉户外面料、可拆洗；金属件做防盐雾腐蚀处理，木作做防晒防水涂装。

【落地效果】藤编餐椅、躺椅与原木、白伞、绿植、海景形成清新通透的地中海度假氛围；防腐与防盐雾处理使家具适应了海滨高盐高湿环境；速干坐垫便于雨后快速恢复使用；不同功能区家具风格统一过渡；整体兼顾度假体验与商业耐用，成为热门日落打卡场所。
desc_en:
The rooftop bar and terrace dining area of a seaside hotel in Barcelona, Spain, approx. 500 sqm, positioned as a Mediterranean, sun-filled, sea-facing high-end outdoor social space. Solid wood and rattan, off-white and terracotta cushions, white parasols and abundant greenery with a bar and lounge booths create a relaxed, holiday-like yet refined atmosphere.

Client needs: terrace furniture must be highly weatherproof — sun-, water- and salt-corrosion-resistant for the seaside; seating must be relaxed, comfortable and fresh to echo the Mediterranean theme; it must cover dining, bar-stool and lounger zones; cushions must be quick-dry, mould-resistant and easy to clean; furniture must withstand sun and rain and last.

Solution: rot-resistant solid wood, aluminium and synthetic rattan as main materials for texture and weather resistance; rattan-back outdoor dining chairs with weatherproof tabletops in the dining zone; bar stools at the counter; loungers and low banquette sofas in the lounge; quick-dry, mould-resistant, removable-cover outdoor cushions; salt-corrosion-treated metal and sun- and water-coated woodwork.

Result: rattan chairs and loungers with solid wood, white parasols, greenery and sea views form a fresh, airy Mediterranean holiday atmosphere; rot- and salt-treatment suits the high-salt, humid seaside; quick-dry cushions allow fast reuse after rain; zones transition seamlessly in one style; the whole balances a holiday experience with commercial durability, becoming a popular sunset spot.
